Alex Chen
San Francisco, CA · alex.chen@example.com · 555-0123 · linkedin.com/in/alex-chen-de

SUMMARY
Senior Data Engineer with 7 years building scalable data pipelines at high-growth startups. Specialized in real-time streaming with Kafka, batch processing with Spark, and orchestration with Airflow. Led the platform migration from on-prem Hadoop to Snowflake at Acme, processing 50M events/day.

EXPERIENCE

Senior Data Engineer | Acme Corp | Mar 2020 - Present
- Led migration from on-prem Hadoop to Snowflake, processing 50M events/day, cutting infra cost by 40%.
- Built real-time fraud detection pipeline in Kafka + Flink, reducing fraud loss from 2.1% to 0.3% in 6 months.
- Mentored 5 mid-level engineers; promoted 2 to senior in the last 18 months.
- Owned the data quality framework across 30+ pipelines using Great Expectations.

Data Engineer | BigCo | Jul 2017 - Feb 2020
- Designed dbt-based analytics layer serving 200+ stakeholders; cut report latency from 24h to 15min.
- Wrote and maintained 80+ Airflow DAGs, monitored via custom Grafana dashboards.
- Built data integration framework for 12 source systems using Python and SQL.

Junior Data Engineer | StartupXYZ | Jun 2015 - Jun 2017
- Built ETL pipelines in Python/PostgreSQL for early product analytics.
- Implemented warehouse star schema; supported analytics team SQL training.

EDUCATION
M.S. Computer Science (Data Systems) | Stanford University | 2015
B.S. Computer Engineering | UC Berkeley | 2013

SKILLS
Languages: Python, SQL, Scala, Go, Java
Data: Spark, Snowflake, BigQuery, dbt, Kafka, Flink, Airflow, Great Expectations
Cloud: AWS (S3, EMR, Glue, Lambda), GCP (BigQuery, Dataflow, Cloud Storage)
Tools: Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, Git, Tableau, Looker
